examples: They swear, they are ill-mannered and aggressive, willful as two-years-olds and utterly selfish.
For that, a half century of willful forgetting about painful memories like the German Titanic was perhaps a reasonable price to pay.
They are made much worse by our willful blindness to risk as much as our reluctance to work together before everything goes to hell.
Willful and malicious enterprise end-users can easily bypass policies implemented in stateful inspection firewalls.
Two years later, he was indicted for willful evasion and was advised to take a plea.
